source: CFPB HMDA loan-level FHA, 310,592 records CLTV 70-100, years 2023+2025
verdict: REPLICATED on FHA + time-stable across 2023/2025; lender ordering preserved; MrCooper null in both years
caveat: Part of cliff likely product-eligibility mechanics (FHA cash-out LTV cap 80 since 2019), but inter-lender difference in same band (Guild 18.3% vs Rocket 82.9%, 2025) is behavioral
